title: Fix weekly audit scripts: fail-closed exit code propagation and correct ci_gate path

verification.plan: 1. Fix incorrect ci_gate.py path in tools/weekly-audit.sh (ci_gate.py -> tools/ci_gate.py). 2. Add PIPESTATUS-based exit code propagation in bash script so tee pipeline failures are not masked. 3. Add $LASTEXITCODE checks in PowerShell script after each external command. 4. Ensure PASS banner is only emitted when all steps succeed. 5. Validate changes with local ci_gate.py run.

evidence.notes: Bug fixes to weekly audit scripts: corrected ci_gate.py path reference and added proper exit code propagation to enforce fail-closed behavior in both bash and PowerShell implementations.
